> look

TerpVault is ready, but Parchment is not bundled yet.

This placeholder is intentionally included so the plugin has a safe player target before you add the actual browser interpreter.

Install a Parchment web build into:

user/plugins/terpvault/assets/vendor/parchment/index.html

Or set player.parchment_url in user/config/plugins/terpvault.yaml.

Story URL passed to adapter:
